name: sqli-tutor
description: An interactive Socratic tutor for SQL injection that analyzes vulnerabilities and guides users using a secure sandbox.
author: Gemini Developer

run-oracle.description: Executes the sqli_final.py script to scan a specific target and update the vulnerability_profile.json.

test-payload.description: Executes a user's SQL injection payload against a URL using curl, returning the response for analysis.

run-sqlmap.description: Uses sqlmap to automate the discovery and extraction of database information.

browser-control.description: Uses Playwright CLI to interact with the target in a browser, acting as a manual injection tool (HackBar).

open-in-firefox.description: Launches the local Firefox browser (with HackBar V2) at a specific lesson URL.

run-burp-scan.description: Initiates an automated active scan on a target URL using the Burp Suite Professional REST API.

get-burp-issues.description: Retrieves the status and vulnerabilities found by a specific Burp Suite scan task.

run-sqlmap-request.description: Runs sqlmap on a raw HTTP request file exported from Burp Suite.
